title: Muffles&Truffles
description: This mod adds a mob to the game called the shroomkin, the shroomkin is a wandering trader esc type mob with some mechanics mixed in from the pilgin, if your looking to overhaul the mushroom fields were your mod!
body:
+ **What dose this mod add** -

A wandering barter in the mushroom feilds called the "Shroomkin" you can trade by right clicking on the mob with redstone for some goodies!

+ **Why our mod?** -

_Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs_

+ **Other things before you download** -

There are other plans for the mod this is more like an early access of the mod so do expect more features oh this soon


---

thanks for the support - Melon
